findingsNew.title: /design:motion metadata omits the packet's required procedure-card surface
findingsNew.claim: /design:motion command metadata does not enumerate the motion packet's own procedures surface even though the packet makes procedure-card selection part of the motion routing/proof contract.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked /design:motion choreography, proofFields, and taskProjections for procedure-card or no-card-fallback coverage; choreography stops at references/, proofFields are generic, and taskProjections is empty.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: Command metadata may intend references/ as shorthand for all private internals, but the packet treats procedures as a distinct load-bearing surface and prior P1-009-001 classifies the same omission pattern for foundations as required-fix severity.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade only if command metadata is explicitly documented as intentionally excluding private procedure cards while another generated command surface reliably loads and verifies procedure-card selection for /design:motion.

traceabilityChecks.spec_code: pass: reviewed design-motion packet only, with required doctrine/state and hub metadata comparison inputs
traceabilityChecks.checklist_evidence: not-applicable: review evidence artifacts only; no checklist completion modified
traceabilityChecks.skill_agent: pass: SKILL and registry tool surfaces allow Read/Glob/Grep and forbid Write/Edit/Bash; packet guidance does not require forbidden tools
traceabilityChecks.agent_cross_runtime: pass: no subagents dispatched; direct fallback is Read/Glob/Grep only
traceabilityChecks.feature_catalog_code: partial: detailed catalog validation assigned to iteration 13
traceabilityChecks.playbook_capability: partial: detailed playbook validation assigned to iteration 13

title: /design:motion metadata omits the packet's required procedure-card surface
claim: /design:motion command metadata does not enumerate the motion packet's own procedures surface even though the packet makes procedure-card selection part of the motion routing/proof contract.
counterevidenceSought: Checked /design:motion choreography, proofFields, and taskProjections for procedure-card or no-card-fallback coverage; choreography stops at references/, proofFields are generic, and taskProjections is empty.
alternativeExplanation: Command metadata may intend references/ as shorthand for all private internals, but the packet treats procedures as a distinct load-bearing surface and prior P1-009-001 classifies the same omission pattern for foundations as required-fix severity.
scopeProof: Motion packet has exactly one local procedure file and one shared procedure path referenced by SKILL.md; neither is named by /design:motion choreography.
recommendation: Add the motion procedure-card surface to /design:motion metadata, or add an explicit command projection/proof field that covers procedure-card selection and no-card fallback.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade only if command metadata is explicitly documented as intentionally excluding private procedure cards while another generated command surface reliably loads and verifies procedure-card selection for /design:motion.

basis: Existing registry contains P1-009-001 for /design:foundations command metadata, but no active finding for /design:motion or design-motion procedure-card command projection.

notes: Assigned packet exists and target evidence stayed inside design-motion except required doctrine/state and hub metadata inputs.
This leaf review produced evidence artifacts only and did not update checklist completion state.
Packet and registry agree on Read/Glob/Grep-only operation, and direct fallback forbids Write/Edit/Bash/Task reliance.
No subagents were dispatched during this LEAF review iteration.
Detailed catalog validation is assigned to iteration 13; this pass used assets for correctness/security only.
Manual playbook files were discovered; detailed playbook capability validation is assigned to iteration 13.
